title: Shadow Expert Mining Playbook
description: Find unofficial help-desk hubs punished by availability metrics. Observe, reframe, mine repeat questions into tools and training.

mindset.principle: Bad numbers on one KPI can mean unpaid value on another. Watch before you write up.

mistakes.label: Performance talk from one dashboard column
mistakes.cost: You punish the person everyone else queues for

mistakes.label: Miss the informal queue at their desk
mistakes.cost: Hidden call center stays invisible to staffing and comp

mistakes.label: Mine expertise with no role or time adjustment
mistakes.cost: Expert burns out; peers lose lifeline

mistakes.label: Build generic training ignoring repeat questions
mistakes.cost: Tools solve problems that never appeared on the floor

scope.focus: Support, service desk, or ops floor with availability and quality metrics
not_for: mf-tpl-056 wrong-seat boredom (different: expert pulled into hub role)

metric_mismatch_signals: Low availability or low time-on-phone with high quality scores
Fast resolution when they do take work
Peers queue at desk or chat ping volume spikes around one person
After-call work inflated while helping others live
Manager sees shitty numbers; team sees go-to expert

watch_for: Whether they decline queue or always accept
Impact on their primary metric column

decision_branches.situation: Dashboard red on availability, green on quality
Top repeat themes identified (3+ in a week)

question_log_sprint.output: Ranked themes for mf-tool or mf-tpl candidates

rules: Theme with 3+ hits in sprint → draft pack or FAQ candidate
Self-serve possible → tool or template first
Judgment heavy → training module or office hours slot
Expert credited as source in internal changelog

role_adjustment_options: Tier-2 / escalation lane with staffing credit
Paid SME stipend or reduced phone quota
Rotate hub duty across qualified peers

steps.name: Flag mismatch
steps.goal: Do not discipline on one KPI alone

steps.name: Reframe conversation
steps.goal: Name shadow hub; thank; ask structured capture

agent_signal.use_when: Support metrics show low availability but high quality. Peers queue for one expert. Repeat questions not captured in training.
decision_criteria: Observe informal hub before performance write-up.
Mine repeat questions into tools/training backlog.
Adjust role or exempt metric before burnout.
agent_signal.operator_context: Metric-heavy support floors: unpaid help shows as bad availability.
agent_signal.not_for: Generic ops — fetch only when use_when matches; do not replace spine chain packs.
trigger_phrases: Support metrics show low availability but high quality. Peers queue for one expert. Repeat questions not captured in training.
Need playbook: Shadow Expert Mining Playbook
